headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Teledyne Technologies, Raises Price Target to $677
summary: Citigroup  analyst John Godyn   maintains Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $649 to $677.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Teledyne Technologies (TDY) After Its Recent Share Price Swings
summary: If you are wondering whether Teledyne Technologies at around US$617.97 is offering good value today, it helps to step back from the headline price and look at what different valuation methods are saying. The stock has seen mixed recent moves, with a 1.2% decline over the last week and a 10.3% decline over 30 days, set against a 19.1% gain year to date and a 23.7% return over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on Teledyne Technologies in the context of its broader technology peers and...
